name: research-tools
description: Research skills and MCP servers for papers, Zotero, clean web-page extraction, and source-backed LLM Wiki maintenance.

interface.shortDescription: Paper search, Zotero, clean extraction, and LLM Wiki tools.
interface.longDescription: Research Tools packages paper-search MCP, Zotero MCP, the Defuddle skill, and the Research LLM Wiki workflow for source-backed Obsidian research synthesis.
defaultPrompt: Search papers and organize research references.
Use the Research LLM Wiki to ingest, query, or lint my research vault wiki.
